title: Mobility Enchants
description: A datapack that adds some mobility granting enchantments
body:
Adds 9 new enchantments, all of which are found in treasure loot pools.

The first four are for the leggings of your choice.

Do note that all four of these enchantments are incompatible with each other, so choose which one you like the most and apply them to your pair of leggings!

**Air Jump** - traditional double jump.

**Air Glide** - allows the user to glide in the air. Can be cancelled and re-activated mid-air.

**Air Lift** - allows the user to slowly rise in the air. Can be cancelled and re-activated mid-air.

**Blink** - a double "jump" that teleports the user to where they are heading. Teleportation is assistive, to make sure the player is not teleported inside blocks when used.

The following however, are for your boots of choice:

**Long Jump** - allows the user to jump really high and really far after sprinting for a short duration

**Short Leap** - improves the user's sprint-jump by making them slowly increase in height and horizontal displacement. Shares the same cooldown as most double jumps for leggings so keep that in mind!

**Dash** _(1.21.11+ only)_ - allows the user to dash by double tapping a direction. Each level increases dash displacement but also hunger cost. Up to level 3, level 1 does not drain hunger.

Do note that they are all incompatible with each other as well!

The rest below are miscellaneous enchantments but are still movement related.

**Recoil** _(1.21.11+ only)_ - gives your crossbows recoil and also increases arrow velocity as a weird side-effect (which in turn, increases arrow damage). Level increases recoil power and projectile velocity. Up to level 3.

**Aero Periphery** _(1.21.11+ only)_ - using you bow greatly reduces gravity and allows you to hover for a short duration.

Check out my other datapacks:

[Rapiers (1.21.11+)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rapiers-datapack)

[Blaze Attack Animation (1.19.4+)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blaze-attack-animation)

[Extra Bows (1.21.9+)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/extra-bows)
